resources.string: We connect schools and companies in a single platform to create real opportunities and simplify talent management.
Track your practical progress and connect with top companies in a simple and fast way.
A simple and efficient way to manage internships, track progress and connect students, supervisors and companies in one place.
Sign in to your account to continue.
Choose your profile and fill in the required information.
This account type requires validation by the institution or administrator before full access to the platform is granted.
Please correct the highlighted fields before continuing.
Password must be at least 6 characters long.
Student number must contain only digits.
Tax ID must contain only digits.
Name must have at least 2 characters.
Company name must have at least 2 characters.
Could not sign in. Please check your email and password.
Could not create the account. Please check your details or try again.
This email is already registered. Try signing in.
The password does not meet the security requirements.
Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
An error occurred. Please try again later.
Could not save profile data. Please check the database permissions.
When internships are published, they will appear here.
Try searching for another course, company or location.
Could not load internships. Please try again.
When there are active internship students, they will appear here.
Completed internships will appear in this section.
Here you will be able to review received applications.
Here you will be able to publish a new internship offer.
Here you will be able to manage company supervisors and users.
Here you will be able to view and edit company information.
Unknown user type. Please contact support.
The number of vacancies must be numeric.
There must be at least 1 vacancy.
The maximum number of vacancies is 99.
Could not update the application status.
Could not create the offer. Please try again.
You do not have permission to create offers. Check if this account is registered as a company.
Could not find company data linked to this account.
The offers table structure is not compatible with the submitted data.
Session expired. Please log in again.
Could not load offer details. Please try again.
You have already applied to this offer.
You do not have permission to apply to this offer.
Could not identify the company for this offer.
Could not send the application. Please try again.
Upload both the motivation letter and CV before submitting.
Could not read the selected documents.
There are no received applications yet.
There are no seen applications yet.
Here you will receive updates about applications and internships.
Here you will be able to exchange messages with companies and supervisors.
Here you will be able to view and edit your profile.
Could not mark the application as seen.
You have not submitted any applications yet.
You can only confirm attendance after the application is accepted.
Available after the application is accepted
Could not accept the internship. Please try again.
Waiting for the student to accept the internship.
You have not saved any internships yet.
Could not mark the notification as read.
You do not have notifications yet.
Could not load the company profile.
This company has not added a description yet.
This company has not published internships yet.
Could not update the company profile.
Account created successfully. You can now sign in.
This action removes the offer from the main list, but keeps its history and related applications.
Do you want to activate this offer again?
You do not have permission to view this candidate.
You do not have permission to view this student.
This student is not currently in an internship.
Could not load the student profile.
This student will no longer appear as an active internship, but the history will be kept.
This student will appear as an active internship again.
Could not update the student status.
This offer will no longer appear to students. Existing applications will be kept.
Enter a valid number of vacancies.
Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
There are no applications in this filter.
Show only offers with at least one vacancy.
There are no messages in this application yet.
Conversations linked to your applications will appear here.
Are you sure you want to delete this advisor?
You do not have any advisors registered yet.
Here you will follow assigned students.
There is no information to show here yet.
Here you will receive updates about assigned students.
Here you will be able to view and edit your profile.
There are no recent activities yet.
There are no documents available yet.
The evaluation has not been submitted yet.
Talk to the student or the institution whenever needed.
There is no advisor invite for this email.
To create an advisor account, the company must have previously created an invite with this email.
The advisor must use this email to create their own account in the app. The company does not set the password for the advisor.
Could not load the student profile.
There are no advisors available yet.
There are no active advisors yet.
An advisor has been assigned to your application.
You have received a new message about your application/internship.
A teacher has been assigned to your internship.
You do not have assigned students yet.
Here you will be able to manage students and teachers.
Invite created. The user must create an account with this email.
There is no invite for this email. Contact the institution.
To create a teacher account, the institution must have previously created an invite with this email.
To create a student account, your institution must have previously created an invite with this email.
Invite created. The student must create an account with this email.
An invite already exists for this email.
Here you will be able to view your assigned students.
Here you will be able to manage your tasks.
Here you will be able to exchange messages with students and companies.
Manage your students and teachers associated with the platform.
There are no registered users yet.
Start by adding students or teachers to your institution.
Could not load the institution home.
Start by adding students or teachers to your institution.
This invite has not been accepted yet. Do you want to delete it?
An accepted invite cannot be deleted.
Check the status of your applications
Send the first message about this internship.
When tasks are created for internships, they will appear here.
A new student has been assigned to you.
You don\'t have any guidance requests yet.
Could not load requests. Try again.
Are you sure you want to reject this guidance request?
Enter a valid grade between 0 and 20.
Could not save the evaluation. Please try again.
The evaluations table is not available yet. Contact the administrator.
You don\'t have any notifications yet.
You do not have any pending requests yet.
There are no recent activities yet.
This company has not published any offers yet.
Teachers associated with this institution will appear here.
Students associated with this institution will appear here.
When an advisor is assigned, their details will appear here.
